prompts.title: Plan de Entrenamiento Personalizado Completo
prompts.prompt_en: Act as a certified personal trainer and sports nutritionist. Design a complete 4-week progressive training program based on my profile. Ask me these questions first, then build the plan: (1) Current fitness level and training experience, (2) Available equipment and workout location, (3) Primary goal (muscle gain, fat loss, endurance, flexibility), (4) Time available per session and days per week, (5) Any injuries or physical limitations. The program must include: a weekly split with exercises, sets, reps, and rest periods in table format; progressive overload strategy (how weights/reps increase each week); warm-up and cool-down routines; RPE (Rate of Perceived Exertion) targets for each session; one deload recommendation. Format as a structured 4-week calendar. Include form cues for compound movements in [brackets]. Start by asking me the profile questions.
prompts.description_es: Un entrenador personal certificado que diseña un programa progresivo de 4 semanas adaptado a tu nivel, equipo disponible y objetivos específicos.
prompts.narration_es: Obtén un plan de entrenamiento profesional sin pagar un entrenador. Este prompt diseña cuatro semanas de ejercicios progresivos adaptados a tu nivel y equipo disponible. Incluye series, repeticiones, descansos y hasta indicaciones de forma correcta.

prompts.title: Sistema GTD con Priorización Inteligente
prompts.prompt_en: Act as a productivity consultant who uses the Getting Things Done (GTD) methodology combined with the Eisenhower Matrix. I will give you a brain dump of all my pending tasks, commitments, and ideas. Your job is to: (1) Capture and clarify each item into actionable next steps, (2) Organize them into the four Eisenhower quadrants (Urgent+Important, Important+Not Urgent, Urgent+Not Important, Neither), (3) For each task, estimate time needed and suggest the best time block in a typical workday, (4) Identify tasks that can be delegated or eliminated entirely. Present the final output as a structured weekly action plan in a table format with columns: Task | Quadrant | Time Estimate | Suggested Time Block | Notes. Here is my brain dump: [paste your tasks here]
prompts.description_es: Combina el método GTD con la Matriz de Eisenhower para organizar todas tus tareas pendientes en un plan de acción semanal estructurado.
prompts.narration_es: ¿Tienes la cabeza llena de tareas pendientes? Este prompt combina dos métodos de productividad poderosos para organizar todo tu caos mental. Solo haz un volcado de todas tus tareas y la IA las organiza en un plan semanal con prioridades claras.

prompts.title: Generador de Prompts para Arte IA
prompts.prompt_en: You are a master prompt engineer for AI image generation tools like Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion. I will describe a visual concept. Your job: (1) Generate 5 progressively detailed prompt variations from simple to complex, (2) For each specify recommended tool, aspect ratio, style keywords, lighting, camera angle, and negative prompts, (3) Explain the prompt engineering logic behind your word choices, (4) Suggest 3 artist style references matching the mood, (5) Provide a remix recipe combining the best elements into one ultimate prompt. Format as numbered blocks. My visual concept: [describe what you want to see]
prompts.description_es: Un experto en prompt engineering para generación de imágenes IA que crea 5 variaciones progresivas con lógica explicada y referencias artísticas.
prompts.narration_es: ¿Quieres crear arte increíble con inteligencia artificial? Este prompt genera cinco variaciones progresivas optimizadas para Midjourney, DALL-E o Stable Diffusion. Te explica la lógica detrás de cada palabra clave y sugiere referencias artísticas para el resultado perfecto.

prompts.title: Transformación Pixar 3D — Convierte cualquier foto en personaje animado
prompts.prompt_en: Transform this photo into a Pixar-style 3D animated character. Keep the person's exact facial features, hairstyle, and clothing but render everything in the hyper-polished Pixar/Disney animation style. The character should be standing in a simple, clean studio background with soft cinematic lighting. Make the eyes slightly larger and more expressive (Pixar style), smooth the skin texture to match 3D rendering, and add subtle ambient occlusion. The final result should look like an official Pixar movie character poster — vibrant colors, ray-traced reflections, and that signature Pixar warmth. Maintain 100% likeness to the original person. [Upload your photo]
prompts.description_es: Convierte cualquier foto en un personaje estilo Pixar 3D con los rasgos exactos de la persona. El prompt más viral del momento.
prompts.narration_es: El prompt más viral de internet en este momento. Sube tu foto y la IA te convierte en un personaje de Pixar con tus rasgos exactos. Funciona increíblemente bien con ChatGPT y crea resultados que parecen sacados de una película real de Disney.

prompts.title: Action Figure Personalizado — Tu foto en caja de juguete
prompts.prompt_en: Create a hyper-realistic product photo of a custom action figure based on this person's photo. The figure should be inside a sealed, clear plastic blister pack with a branded cardboard backing. The packaging should include: the person's name as the toy brand name in bold stylized font at the top, a tagline related to their profession or hobby, and 3-4 miniature accessories that match their personality laid out beside the figure. The action figure itself must perfectly replicate the person's face, hair, outfit, and proportions in 6-inch action figure scale. Professional product photography, studio lighting, slight plastic sheen on the figure. Background: clean white or gradient. Make it look like a real collectible toy you'd find at a store. [Upload photo + name + profession]
prompts.description_es: Convierte tu foto en un action figure coleccionable dentro de su caja. Ultra viral en redes sociales.
prompts.narration_es: ¿Quieres verte como un muñeco coleccionable? Este prompt crea un action figure personalizado con tu cara, tu ropa y accesorios relacionados con tu profesión. Todo dentro de una caja de juguete realista. Es el contenido perfecto para redes sociales.

prompts.title: Studio Ghibli Transformation — Foto a anime Miyazaki
prompts.prompt_en: Transform this photo into a Studio Ghibli / Hayao Miyazaki anime art style scene. The person should keep their exact features, clothing, and pose but be redrawn in the signature Ghibli watercolor-meets-cel-animation style. Place them in a dreamy, whimsical Ghibli-inspired environment — lush green hills, floating clouds, warm golden-hour sunlight filtering through trees, or a cozy countryside village. Include subtle Ghibli details: wind gently blowing hair or clothes, tiny magical creatures peeking from behind objects, soft pastel sky gradients. The color palette should be warm and nostalgic with that distinctive Ghibli softness. Maintain full likeness. [Upload your photo]
prompts.description_es: Transforma tu foto al estilo anime de Studio Ghibli con fondos mágicos al estilo Miyazaki. Trending global.
prompts.narration_es: Otro prompt súper viral. Transforma cualquier foto al estilo Studio Ghibli de Hayao Miyazaki. La IA mantiene tus rasgos pero te redibuja con ese estilo anime acuarela tan icónico, con fondos mágicos llenos de detalles encantadores.

prompts.title: LinkedIn Profile Headshot Profesional con IA
prompts.prompt_en: Transform this casual photo into a premium, corporate LinkedIn headshot. The person should look polished and professional while maintaining 100% facial likeness. Apply these changes: dress them in a well-fitted dark navy or charcoal business blazer with a crisp white shirt underneath, professional grooming with neat hair styling, perfect skin (remove blemishes but keep natural), confident and approachable slight smile. Background: soft blurred gradient (navy to light blue) typical of professional studio headshots. Lighting: Rembrandt lighting setup with a soft key light from 45 degrees, gentle fill light, and subtle rim light to separate from background. Final look: Fortune 500 executive headshot quality. [Upload your photo]
prompts.description_es: Convierte cualquier selfie en una foto profesional de LinkedIn nivel ejecutivo. Ahorra cientos de dólares en fotógrafo.
prompts.narration_es: ¿Necesitas una foto profesional para LinkedIn pero no quieres pagar un fotógrafo? Este prompt transforma cualquier selfie en un headshot corporativo de nivel ejecutivo. Con iluminación de estudio, traje profesional y fondo perfecto.

prompts.title: Generador de Logos Profesionales desde Cero
prompts.prompt_en:
Act as a world-class brand identity designer from a top agency like Pentagram or Wolff Olins. I need you to design a complete logo concept for my brand. Here are the details:

Brand name: [YOUR BRAND NAME]
Industry: [YOUR INDUSTRY]
Target audience: [DESCRIBE YOUR AUDIENCE]
Brand personality: [e.g., modern, playful, luxury, minimal, bold]
Preferred colors: [or say 'surprise me']

Deliver:
1. THREE distinct logo concepts — each with a different design direction (wordmark, icon+text, abstract mark)
2. For each concept provide: the SVG code I can use directly, color hex codes, font recommendation (from Google Fonts), the design rationale explaining symbolism and psychology behind choices
3. A mini brand guide: primary/secondary colors, do's and don'ts for logo usage, recommended background combinations
4. Mockup suggestions: describe how each logo would look on a business card, website header, and social media avatar

Make the designs clean, modern, and scalable. Think Apple, Stripe, Linear level of design quality.
prompts.description_es: Un diseñador de identidad de marca nivel agencia top que crea 3 conceptos de logo con SVG, guía de marca y mockups.
prompts.narration_es: ¿Necesitas un logo profesional sin pagar miles a una agencia? Este prompt actúa como un diseñador de Pentagram y te entrega tres conceptos de logo completos con código SVG listo para usar, paleta de colores, tipografía y hasta una mini guía de marca.

prompts.title: Crea tu Propio GPT Personalizado — Instrucciones Completas
prompts.prompt_en:
You are an expert GPT builder and prompt engineer. I want to create a custom GPT (for ChatGPT's GPT Builder) that serves as: [DESCRIBE YOUR GPT'S PURPOSE, e.g., 'a personal Spanish tutor that adapts to my level']

Generate the complete configuration:

1. **Name & Description**: A catchy name and compelling 1-line description that would make people want to try it
2. **System Instructions**: Write the complete, production-ready system prompt (500-1000 words) that defines the GPT's personality, capabilities, rules, and behavior. Include: role definition, tone of voice, step-by-step interaction flow, edge case handling, output formatting rules, and guardrails
3. **Conversation Starters**: 4 engaging starter prompts that showcase the GPT's best capabilities
4. **Knowledge Files Needed**: List what documents/data I should upload to make this GPT smarter
5. **Actions (API)**: Suggest any external APIs that would enhance this GPT, with endpoint descriptions
6. **Monetization Strategy**: How to position this GPT in the GPT Store for maximum visibility

Make the system prompt sophisticated — use XML tags for structure, include few-shot examples, and add self-correction mechanisms.
prompts.description_es: Genera la configuración completa para crear tu propio GPT personalizado: instrucciones, starters, knowledge files y estrategia de monetización.
prompts.narration_es: ¿Quieres crear tu propio GPT personalizado y hasta venderlo en la GPT Store? Este prompt genera toda la configuración: el system prompt profesional, los conversation starters, qué archivos subir, qué APIs conectar y hasta una estrategia de monetización.
